description: CompositionWhite shirt made of a blended cotton fabric, has three-quarter sleeves with a mid-sleeve flap,  mandarin collar, buttoned chest placket, patch pockets on the left chest with a button closure, branding embroidered above the left pocket and a curved hemFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron: do not iron on decorationsThe patch pocket on the chest and embroidered brand lettering adds rugged styling to this shirt from spykar, while the blended cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
